title: Emcor Group (EME) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Emcor Group (EME) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.32 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.83 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.39 per share a year ago.

title: EMCOR Group, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2023 Results
text: NORWALK, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) today reported results for the quarter ended March 31, 2023. For the first quarter of 2023, net income was $111.5 million, or $2.32 per diluted share, compared to $73.4 million, or $1.39 per diluted share, for the first quarter of 2022. Revenues for the first quarter of 2023 totaled $2.89 billion, an increase of 11.5% from the year ago period. title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP Is Investigating EMCOR Group, Inc. for Potential Breaches of Fiduciary Duty By Its Board of Directors
text: NEW YORK , April 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP, a class action law firm dedicated to representing shareholders nationwide, is investigating a potential breach of fiduciary duty claim involving the board of directors of EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME).
